subcodes.first_line: O My merciful friends! The greatest means for the advancement of this age, the prosperity of nations, and the civilization of peoples is the establishment [3.5s]... ...Every business company should be established on divine principles. Its foundations should be trustworthiness, piety and truthfulness in order to protect the rights of the people
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی من اعظم وسائط ترقیات عصریه و معموریت ممالک و مدنیت امم تاسیس
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
